API docs by Redocly

Nadeshiko API (2.1.0)

Download OpenAPI specification:

URL: https://nadeshiko.co License: AGPL-3.0

Thank you for using the Nadeshiko API! This API lets you search Japanese dialogue segments across anime and J-Drama, with translations and contextual metadata.

Authentication

All public API requests require an API key passed in the Authorization header as Bearer <api_key>. You can register and generate your key on the developer page, where you can also check your current usage.

Request Headers

The only required application-level request header for the public API is:

  • Authorization: Bearer <api_key>

Public API endpoints do not currently expose custom request ID or rate limit response headers.

Rate Limit

Each API key is limited to 150 requests per minute. Exceeding this limit will return a 429 Too Many Requests response. The 429 response body distinguishes between short-term rate limiting and monthly quota exhaustion.

Quota

Each account has a monthly quota of 5,000 requests. Once exceeded, further requests will be rejected until the next month. To request a quota increase, reach out via the contact page.

Search

Search endpoints for querying Japanese segments across indexed media.

Search segments by query

The primary search endpoint for finding Japanese segments and their translations across indexed media (anime, J-Drama).

This endpoint uses Elasticsearch with advanced Japanese text analysis supporting multiple input types (romaji, kanji, kana) and providing intelligent field-based boosting.

Query Features

  • Multi-language Support: Search using Japanese (kanji/kana), Romaji, or English/Spanish
  • Boolean Operators: AND, OR, NOT supported (e.g., (cat OR dog) AND bird)
  • Phrase Matching: Use quotes for exact phrases (e.g., "good morning"), or pass exactMatch: true to the request body
  • Wildcards: te*t format (leading wildcards not supported)
  • Smart Field Selection: Automatically chooses optimal search fields based on input type

Input Type Handling

Input Type Search Strategy
Kanji (食べる, 彼女) Matches against surface form, dictionary form, and normalized form. Reading-only field is disabled to avoid homophones.
Kana (たべる, かのじょ) Matches against surface form, dictionary form, normalized form, and reading form.
Romaji / English / Spanish (go, taberu, good morning) Boosts EN/ES translations. Also matches kana (reading) and normalized Japanese forms as fallbacks.
Authorizations:
ApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object (SearchQuery)

What to search for (omit for queryless browse/stats)

search
string <= 500 characters

Search expression (supports boolean operators, wildcards, phrase matching)

exactMatch
boolean
Default: false

Require exact phrase matching (disables fuzzy and partial matches)

take
integer [ 1 .. 50 ]
Default: 10

Max number of entries per response

cursor
string <= 500 characters

Opaque cursor token returned from the previous search page

object (SearchSort)

Sort configuration

mode
string
Default: "RELEVANCE"
Enum: "RELEVANCE" "ASC" "DESC" "TIME_ASC" "TIME_DESC" "RANDOM"

Sort mode.

  • RELEVANCE (default): Elasticsearch relevance score
  • ASC / DESC: by segment length (character count)
  • TIME_ASC / TIME_DESC: by episode & position within an episode
  • RANDOM: deterministic random order (pass seed for reproducibility)
seed
integer >= 0

Non-negative integer seed for deterministic random sorting (only used when mode is RANDOM)

object (SearchFilters)

Search filters for narrowing segment results

object

Media inclusion/exclusion filters

Array of objects (MediaFilterItem)

Include only segments from these media (with optional episode filter)

Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID (nanoid)

episodes
Array of integers[ items >= 0 ]

Specific episodes (omit for all episodes). Use 0 for movies/specials

Array of objects (MediaFilterItem)

Exclude segments from these media (with optional episode filter)

Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID (nanoid)

episodes
Array of integers[ items >= 0 ]

Specific episodes (omit for all episodes). Use 0 for movies/specials

category
Array of strings (Category)
Default: ["ANIME","JDRAMA"]
Items Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category filter

contentRating
Array of strings (ContentRating)
Items Enum: "SAFE" "SUGGESTIVE" "QUESTIONABLE" "EXPLICIT"

Content ratings to include (omit for all ratings)

status
Array of strings (SegmentStatus)
Default: ["ACTIVE"]
Items Enum: "ACTIVE" "HIDDEN" "DELETED"

Segment status filter

object

Content character count range filter

min
integer >= 0

Minimum content length

max
integer >= 0

Maximum content length

object

Segment audio duration range filter (in milliseconds)

min
integer >= 0

Minimum duration in ms

max
integer >= 0

Maximum duration in ms

languages
Array of strings
Items Enum: "EN" "ES"

Translation languages to include alongside Japanese in search matching.

  • Omitted / null: match against Japanese and all translation languages (default)
  • []: match against Japanese only
  • ["EN"] / ["ES"] / ["EN", "ES"]: match against Japanese plus the listed translation languages
include
Array of strings (IncludeExpansion)
Default: []
Items Value: "media"

Optional resources to expand in the response includes block

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (Segment)
Array
segmentPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the segment (nanoid)

position
required
integer >= 0

Position of the segment within the episode

status
required
string (SegmentStatus)
Enum: "ACTIVE" "HIDDEN" "DELETED"

Segment status

startTimeMs
required
integer >= 0

Start time of the segment in milliseconds from the beginning of the episode

endTimeMs
required
integer >= 0

End time of the segment in milliseconds from the beginning of the episode

contentRating
required
string (ContentRating)
Enum: "SAFE" "SUGGESTIVE" "QUESTIONABLE" "EXPLICIT"

Content rating level for the segment

episode
required
integer >= 0

Episode number this segment belongs to (0 for movies/specials)

mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID of the media this segment belongs to (nanoid)

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

Original Japanese content

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

Japanese content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint.

required
Array of objects or null (Token)

Morphological tokens for interactive display. Populated only for segments with available POS analysis.

Array
s
required
string

Surface form (the text as it appears in the sentence)

d
required
string

Dictionary form (base/lemma form for search)

r
required
string

Reading in katakana

b
required
integer

Begin character offset in textJa.content

e
required
integer

End character offset in textJa.content

p
required
string

Primary part-of-speech tag

p1
required
string or null non-empty

POS subtype 1 (UniDic pos[1])

p2
required
string or null non-empty

POS subtype 2 (UniDic pos[2])

p4
required
string or null non-empty

Conjugation type (UniDic pos[4])

cf
required
string or null non-empty

Conjugation form (UniDic pos[5])

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

English translation

isMachineTranslated
required
boolean

Whether the translation was machine-translated

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

English content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint that matched this language.

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

Spanish translation

isMachineTranslated
required
boolean

Whether the translation was machine-translated

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

Spanish content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint that matched this language.

required
object

URLs to media resources for this segment

imageUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the subtitle image snapshot

audioUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the audio clip for this segment

videoUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the video clip for this segment

object

Optional related resources requested via include[]

object

Media objects keyed by mediaPublicId. Present only when include[]=media is requested.

additional property
object (Media)

Media entry with full metadata

mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the media (use this in public URLs)

slug
required
string non-empty

URL-friendly slug for the media

required
object (ExternalId)

External IDs for this media, keyed by source. Every source appears as a key; absent mappings are represented with a null value.

anilist
required
string or null non-empty

AniList ID

imdb
required
string or null non-empty

IMDB ID

tvdb
required
string or null non-empty

TVDB ID

tmdb
required
string or null non-empty

TMDB ID

nameJa
required
string non-empty

Original Japanese name of the media

nameRomaji
required
string non-empty

Romaji transliteration of the media name

nameEn
required
string non-empty

English name of the media

airingFormat
required
string
Enum: "TV" "MOVIE" "OVA" "ONA" "SPECIAL"

Format of the media release

airingStatus
required
string
Enum: "FINISHED" "RELEASING" "NOT_YET_RELEASED" "CANCELLED"

Current airing status

genres
required
Array of strings[ items non-empty ]

List of genres associated with the media

coverUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the cover image

bannerUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the banner image

startDate
required
string <date> non-empty

Start date of the media (first airing/release)

endDate
required
string or null <date> non-empty

End date of the media (last airing/release)

category
required
string (Category)
Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category type

segmentCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of subtitle segments available

episodeCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of episodes available

studio
required
string or null

Animation studio that produced the media

seasonName
required
string
Enum: "WINTER" "SPRING" "SUMMER" "FALL"

Airing season label for the media

seasonYear
required
integer [ 1900 .. 2100 ]

Airing year for the media

required
object (SearchPagination)

Pagination metadata for search results

hasMore
required
boolean

Whether there are more results after this page

estimatedTotalHits
required
integer >= 0

Estimated total number of matching segments

estimatedTotalHitsRelation
required
string
Enum: "EXACT" "AT_LEAST"

Whether estimatedTotalHits is exact or a lower bound.

  • EXACT: the value is the precise total
  • AT_LEAST: at least this many matches exist (true total may be higher)
cursor
required
string or null non-empty

Opaque cursor token to pass on the next request to fetch the following page

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 400

The HTTP status code

object

Optional map of field names to their error messages (for validation errors)

property name*
additional property
string

string

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/search

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "query": {
    • "search": "(猫 OR 犬) AND 好き",
    • "exactMatch": false
    },
  • "take": 10,
  • "cursor": "eyJraW...N119",
  • "sort": {
    • "mode": "RELEVANCE",
    • "seed": 42
    },
  • "filters": {
    • "media": {
      • "include": [
        • {
          • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
          • "episodes": [
            • 1,
            • 2
            ]
          }
        ],
      • "exclude": [
        • {
          • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
          • "episodes": [
            • 1,
            • 2
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
    • "category": [
      • "ANIME",
      • "JDRAMA"
      ],
    • "contentRating": [
      • "SAFE"
      ],
    • "status": [
      • "ACTIVE"
      ],
    • "segmentLengthChars": {
      • "min": 10,
      • "max": 50
      },
    • "segmentDurationMs": {
      • "min": 1000,
      • "max": 10000
      },
    • "languages": [
      • "EN"
      ]
    },
  • "include": [ ]
}

  • 400
  • 401

  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "segments": [
    • {
      • "segmentPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
      • "position": 1133,
      • "status": "ACTIVE",
      • "startTimeMs": 2007255,
      • "endTimeMs": 2008464,
      • "contentRating": "SAFE",
      • "episode": 1,
      • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
      • "textJa": {
        • "content": "僕は僕で、君は君だ。",
        • "highlight": "string",
        • "tokens": [
          • {
            • "s": "食べ",
            • "d": "食べる",
            • "r": "タベ",
            • "b": 3,
            • "e": 5,
            • "p": "動詞",
            • "p1": "固有名詞",
            • "p2": "人名",
            • "p4": "五段-カ行",
            • "cf": "連用形-一般"
            }
          ]
        },
      • "textEn": {
        • "content": "I am me, and you are you.",
        • "isMachineTranslated": false,
        • "highlight": "string"
        },
      • "textEs": {
        • "content": "Yo soy yo, y tú eres tú.",
        • "isMachineTranslated": false,
        • "highlight": "string"
        },
      • "urls": {
        • "imageUrl": "http://example.com",
        • "audioUrl": "http://example.com",
        • "videoUrl": "http://example.com"
        }
      }
    ],
  • "includes": {
    • "media": {
      • "property1": {
        • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
        • "slug": "bakuman",
        • "externalIds": {
          • "anilist": "21459",
          • "imdb": "tt1234567",
          • "tvdb": "12345",
          • "tmdb": "90955"
          },
        • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
        • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
        • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",
        • "airingFormat": "TV",
        • "airingStatus": "FINISHED",
        • "genres": [
          • "Comedy",
          • "Drama",
          • "Romance",
          • "Slice of Life"
          ],
        • "coverUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/cover.webp",
        • "bannerUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/banner.webp",
        • "startDate": "2010-10-02",
        • "endDate": "2011-04-02",
        • "category": "ANIME",
        • "segmentCount": 1234,
        • "episodeCount": 25,
        • "studio": "J.C.STAFF",
        • "seasonName": "FALL",
        • "seasonYear": 2010
        },
      • "property2": {
        • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
        • "slug": "bakuman",
        • "externalIds": {
          • "anilist": "21459",
          • "imdb": "tt1234567",
          • "tvdb": "12345",
          • "tmdb": "90955"
          },
        • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
        • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
        • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",
        • "airingFormat": "TV",
        • "airingStatus": "FINISHED",
        • "genres": [
          • "Comedy",
          • "Drama",
          • "Romance",
          • "Slice of Life"
          ],
        • "coverUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/cover.webp",
        • "bannerUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/banner.webp",
        • "startDate": "2010-10-02",
        • "endDate": "2011-04-02",
        • "category": "ANIME",
        • "segmentCount": 1234,
        • "episodeCount": 25,
        • "studio": "J.C.STAFF",
        • "seasonName": "FALL",
        • "seasonYear": 2010
        }
      }
    },
  • "pagination": {
    • "hasMore": true,
    • "estimatedTotalHits": 12456,
    • "estimatedTotalHitsRelation": "AT_LEAST",
    • "cursor": "string"
    }
}

Get search statistics

Returns filter statistics for a query without returning segment results. Useful for populating filter UIs:

  • media: media matching the query, with per-episode hit counts
  • categories: segment counts grouped by media category

Stats are scoped by the query and category filters but are not narrowed by a selected media/episode — so selecting a media in the UI doesn't zero out other media from the list.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object (SearchQuery)

What to search for (omit for queryless browse/stats)

search
string <= 500 characters

Search expression (supports boolean operators, wildcards, phrase matching)

exactMatch
boolean
Default: false

Require exact phrase matching (disables fuzzy and partial matches)

object (SearchFilters)

Search filters for narrowing segment results

object

Media inclusion/exclusion filters

Array of objects (MediaFilterItem)

Include only segments from these media (with optional episode filter)

Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID (nanoid)

episodes
Array of integers[ items >= 0 ]

Specific episodes (omit for all episodes). Use 0 for movies/specials

Array of objects (MediaFilterItem)

Exclude segments from these media (with optional episode filter)

Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID (nanoid)

episodes
Array of integers[ items >= 0 ]

Specific episodes (omit for all episodes). Use 0 for movies/specials

category
Array of strings (Category)
Default: ["ANIME","JDRAMA"]
Items Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category filter

contentRating
Array of strings (ContentRating)
Items Enum: "SAFE" "SUGGESTIVE" "QUESTIONABLE" "EXPLICIT"

Content ratings to include (omit for all ratings)

status
Array of strings (SegmentStatus)
Default: ["ACTIVE"]
Items Enum: "ACTIVE" "HIDDEN" "DELETED"

Segment status filter

object

Content character count range filter

min
integer >= 0

Minimum content length

max
integer >= 0

Maximum content length

object

Segment audio duration range filter (in milliseconds)

min
integer >= 0

Minimum duration in ms

max
integer >= 0

Maximum duration in ms

languages
Array of strings
Items Enum: "EN" "ES"

Translation languages to include alongside Japanese in search matching.

  • Omitted / null: match against Japanese and all translation languages (default)
  • []: match against Japanese only
  • ["EN"] / ["ES"] / ["EN", "ES"]: match against Japanese plus the listed translation languages
include
Array of strings (IncludeExpansion)
Default: []
Items Value: "media"

Optional resources to expand in the response includes block

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (MediaSearchStats)
Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID (look up full details in includes.media when include[]=media is requested)

matchCount
required
integer >= 0

Number of matching segments found in this media

required
Array of objects

Episode-level hit counts

Array
episode
required
integer >= 0

Episode number

hitCount
required
integer >= 0

Number of matching segments in this episode

required
Array of objects (CategoryCount)
Array
category
required
string (Category)
Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category type

count
required
integer >= 0

Number of entries in this category

object

Optional related resources requested via include[]

object

Media objects keyed by mediaPublicId. Present only when include[]=media is requested.

additional property
object (Media)

Media entry with full metadata

required
string
Enum: "ACCESS_DENIED" "INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 403

The HTTP status code

object

Optional map of field names to their error messages (for validation errors)

string

string

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/search/stats

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "query": {
    • "search": "(猫 OR 犬) AND 好き",
    • "exactMatch": false
    },
  • "filters": {
    • "media": {
      • "include": [
        • {
          • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
          • "episodes": [
            • 1,
            • 2
            ]
          }
        ],
      • "exclude": [
        • {
          • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
          • "episodes": [
            • 1,
            • 2
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
    • "category": [
      • "ANIME",
      • "JDRAMA"
      ],
    • "contentRating": [
      • "SAFE"
      ],
    • "status": [
      • "ACTIVE"
      ],
    • "segmentLengthChars": {
      • "min": 10,
      • "max": 50
      },
    • "segmentDurationMs": {
      • "min": 1000,
      • "max": 10000
      },
    • "languages": [
      • "EN"
      ]
    },
  • "include": [ ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "media": [
    • {
      • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
      • "matchCount": 42,
      • "episodeHits": [
        • {
          • "episode": 1,
          • "hitCount": 5
          },
        • {
          • "episode": 2,
          • "hitCount": 8
          },
        • {
          • "episode": 3,
          • "hitCount": 3
          }
        ]
      }
    ],
  • "categories": [
    • {
      • "category": "ANIME",
      • "count": 1523
      }
    ],
  • "includes": {
    • "media": {
      • "property1": {
        • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
        • "slug": "bakuman",
        • "externalIds": {
          • "anilist": "21459",
          • "imdb": "tt1234567",
          • "tvdb": "12345",
          • "tmdb": "90955"
          },
        • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
        • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
        • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",
        • "airingFormat": "TV",
        • "airingStatus": "FINISHED",
        • "genres": [
          • "Comedy",
          • "Drama",
          • "Romance",
          • "Slice of Life"
          ],
        • "coverUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/cover.webp",
        • "bannerUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/banner.webp",
        • "startDate": "2010-10-02",
        • "endDate": "2011-04-02",
        • "category": "ANIME",
        • "segmentCount": 1234,
        • "episodeCount": 25,
        • "studio": "J.C.STAFF",
        • "seasonName": "FALL",
        • "seasonYear": 2010
        },
      • "property2": {
        • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
        • "slug": "bakuman",
        • "externalIds": {
          • "anilist": "21459",
          • "imdb": "tt1234567",
          • "tvdb": "12345",
          • "tmdb": "90955"
          },
        • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
        • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
        • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",
        • "airingFormat": "TV",
        • "airingStatus": "FINISHED",
        • "genres": [
          • "Comedy",
          • "Drama",
          • "Romance",
          • "Slice of Life"
          ],
        • "coverUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/cover.webp",
        • "bannerUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/banner.webp",
        • "startDate": "2010-10-02",
        • "endDate": "2011-04-02",
        • "category": "ANIME",
        • "segmentCount": 1234,
        • "episodeCount": 25,
        • "studio": "J.C.STAFF",
        • "seasonName": "FALL",
        • "seasonYear": 2010
        }
      }
    }
}

Search by multiple words

Searches for multiple words simultaneously and aggregates matches per media.

Unlike the main search endpoint, this returns a per-word summary of matches across media rather than individual segments. Filters apply the same way as /v1/search.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
required
object (SearchMultipleQuery)

What to search for (multiple words)

words
required
Array of strings [ 1 .. 100 ] items [ items [ 1 .. 100 ] characters ]

List of words to search for

exactMatch
boolean
Default: false

Require exact phrase matching (disables fuzzy and partial matches)

object (SearchFilters)

Search filters for narrowing segment results

object

Media inclusion/exclusion filters

Array of objects (MediaFilterItem)

Include only segments from these media (with optional episode filter)

Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID (nanoid)

episodes
Array of integers[ items >= 0 ]

Specific episodes (omit for all episodes). Use 0 for movies/specials

Array of objects (MediaFilterItem)

Exclude segments from these media (with optional episode filter)

Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID (nanoid)

episodes
Array of integers[ items >= 0 ]

Specific episodes (omit for all episodes). Use 0 for movies/specials

category
Array of strings (Category)
Default: ["ANIME","JDRAMA"]
Items Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category filter

contentRating
Array of strings (ContentRating)
Items Enum: "SAFE" "SUGGESTIVE" "QUESTIONABLE" "EXPLICIT"

Content ratings to include (omit for all ratings)

status
Array of strings (SegmentStatus)
Default: ["ACTIVE"]
Items Enum: "ACTIVE" "HIDDEN" "DELETED"

Segment status filter

object

Content character count range filter

min
integer >= 0

Minimum content length

max
integer >= 0

Maximum content length

object

Segment audio duration range filter (in milliseconds)

min
integer >= 0

Minimum duration in ms

max
integer >= 0

Maximum duration in ms

languages
Array of strings
Items Enum: "EN" "ES"

Translation languages to include alongside Japanese in search matching.

  • Omitted / null: match against Japanese and all translation languages (default)
  • []: match against Japanese only
  • ["EN"] / ["ES"] / ["EN", "ES"]: match against Japanese plus the listed translation languages
include
Array of strings (IncludeExpansion)
Default: []
Items Value: "media"

Optional resources to expand in the response includes block

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (WordMatch)
Array
word
required
string non-empty

The word that was searched for

isMatch
required
boolean

Indicates whether the word was found in any segment

matchCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of times this word appears across all media

required
Array of objects (WordMatchMedia)

List of media containing this word

Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID (look up full details in includes.media when include[]=media is requested)

matchCount
required
integer >= 0

Number of times the word appears in this media

object

Optional related resources requested via include[]

object

Media objects keyed by mediaPublicId. Present only when include[]=media is requested.

additional property
object (Media)

Media entry with full metadata

mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the media (use this in public URLs)

slug
required
string non-empty

URL-friendly slug for the media

required
object (ExternalId)

External IDs for this media, keyed by source. Every source appears as a key; absent mappings are represented with a null value.

anilist
required
string or null non-empty

AniList ID

imdb
required
string or null non-empty

IMDB ID

tvdb
required
string or null non-empty

TVDB ID

tmdb
required
string or null non-empty

TMDB ID

nameJa
required
string non-empty

Original Japanese name of the media

nameRomaji
required
string non-empty

Romaji transliteration of the media name

nameEn
required
string non-empty

English name of the media

airingFormat
required
string
Enum: "TV" "MOVIE" "OVA" "ONA" "SPECIAL"

Format of the media release

airingStatus
required
string
Enum: "FINISHED" "RELEASING" "NOT_YET_RELEASED" "CANCELLED"

Current airing status

genres
required
Array of strings[ items non-empty ]

List of genres associated with the media

coverUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the cover image

bannerUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the banner image

startDate
required
string <date> non-empty

Start date of the media (first airing/release)

endDate
required
string or null <date> non-empty

End date of the media (last airing/release)

category
required
string (Category)
Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category type

segmentCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of subtitle segments available

episodeCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of episodes available

studio
required
string or null

Animation studio that produced the media

seasonName
required
string
Enum: "WINTER" "SPRING" "SUMMER" "FALL"

Airing season label for the media

seasonYear
required
integer [ 1900 .. 2100 ]

Airing year for the media

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 400

The HTTP status code

object

Optional map of field names to their error messages (for validation errors)

property name*
additional property
string
Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_INVALID" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_EXPIRED"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

instance

string

title
required
string non-empty

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 500

The HTTP status code

object

Optional map of field names to their error messages (for validation errors)

property name*
additional property
string

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/search/words

Content type
application/json

  • "query": {
    • "words": [
      • "彼女",
      • "私"
      ],
    • "exactMatch": false
    },
  • "filters": {
    • "media": {
      • "include": [
        • {
          • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
          • "episodes": [
            • 1,
            • 2
            ]
          }
        ],
      • "exclude": [
        • {
          • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
          • "episodes": [
            • 1,
            • 2
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
    • "category": [
      • "ANIME",
      • "JDRAMA"
      ],
    • "contentRating": [
      • "SAFE"
      ],
    • "status": [
      • "ACTIVE"
      ],
    • "segmentLengthChars": {
      • "min": 10,
      • "max": 50
      },
    • "segmentDurationMs": {
      • "min": 1000,
      • "max": 10000
      },
    • "languages": [
      • "EN"
      ]
    },
  • "include": [ ]
}

        • "bannerUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/banner.webp",
        • "startDate": "2010-10-02",
        • "endDate": "2011-04-02",
        • "category": "ANIME",
        • "segmentCount": 1234,
        • "episodeCount": 25,
        • "studio": "J.C.STAFF",
        • "seasonName": "FALL",
        • "seasonYear": 2010
        },
      • "property2": {
        • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
        • "slug": "bakuman",
        • "externalIds": {
          • "anilist": "21459",
          • "imdb": "tt1234567",
          • "tvdb": "12345",
          • "tmdb": "90955"
          },
        • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
        • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
        • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",

Find media by name

Returns a short list of media matching a name prefix or substring. Results are ranked by exact match, then prefix match, then contains match, and further sorted by name length.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
query
required
string non-empty .*\S.*

Search term to match against media names (English, Japanese, romaji)

take
integer [ 1 .. 40 ]
Default: 10

Maximum number of results to return

object (SearchMediaFilters)

Filters for narrowing media search results

category
Array of strings (Category)
Default: ["ANIME","JDRAMA"]
Items Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category filter

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (MediaSummary)
Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the media

slug
required
string non-empty

URL-friendly slug for the media

nameJa
required
string non-empty

Original Japanese name of the media

nameRomaji
required
string non-empty

Romaji transliteration of the media name

nameEn
required
string non-empty

English name of the media

coverUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the cover image

category
required
string (Category)
Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category type

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 400

The HTTP status code

object

Optional map of field names to their error messages (for validation errors)

property name*
additional property
string

code
required
string
Enum: "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_INVALID" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_EXPIRED"

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/search/media

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "query": "steins",
  • "take": 10,
  • "filters": {
    • "category": [
      • "ANIME",
      • "JDRAMA"
      ]
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "media": [
    • {
      • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
      • "slug": "bakuman",
      • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
      • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
      • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",
      • "coverUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/cover.webp",
      • "category": "ANIME"
      }
    ]
}

Media

Media endpoints for browsing anime and J-Drama entries, episodes, and segments.

List all media

Returns a paginated list of media with full metadata, including cover/banner images, episode counts, and genres. Supports filtering by category and text search.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
query Parameters
take
integer [ 1 .. 40 ]
Default: 20

Number of results per page

cursor
string

Opaque pagination cursor token

category
string
Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"
Example: category=ANIME

Filter by media category

query
string
Example: query=steins

Search term to match against media names (English, Japanese, romaji)

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (Media)
Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the media (use this in public URLs)

slug
required
string non-empty

URL-friendly slug for the media

required
object (ExternalId)

External IDs for this media, keyed by source. Every source appears as a key; absent mappings are represented with a null value.

anilist
required
string or null non-empty

AniList ID

imdb
required
string or null non-empty

IMDB ID

tvdb
required
string or null non-empty

TVDB ID

tmdb
required
string or null non-empty

TMDB ID

nameJa
required
string non-empty

Original Japanese name of the media

nameRomaji
required
string non-empty

Romaji transliteration of the media name

nameEn
required
string non-empty

English name of the media

airingFormat
required
string
Enum: "TV" "MOVIE" "OVA" "ONA" "SPECIAL"

Format of the media release

airingStatus
required
string
Enum: "FINISHED" "RELEASING" "NOT_YET_RELEASED" "CANCELLED"

Current airing status

genres
required
Array of strings[ items non-empty ]

List of genres associated with the media

coverUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the cover image

bannerUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the banner image

startDate
required
string <date> non-empty

Start date of the media (first airing/release)

endDate
required
string or null <date> non-empty

End date of the media (last airing/release)

category
required
string (Category)
Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category type

segmentCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of subtitle segments available

episodeCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of episodes available

studio
required
string or null

Animation studio that produced the media

seasonName
required
string
Enum: "WINTER" "SPRING" "SUMMER" "FALL"

Airing season label for the media

seasonYear
required
integer [ 1900 .. 2100 ]

Airing year for the media

required
object (CursorPagination)

Opaque cursor pagination metadata

hasMore
required
boolean

Whether more results are available

cursor
required
string or null non-empty

Opaque token to pass on the next request to fetch the following page

required
object (MediaGlobalStats)

Global corpus totals across all media

totalMedia
required
integer >= 0

Total number of media across all pages

totalSegments
required
integer >= 0

Total number of non-deleted segments

totalEpisodes
required
integer >= 0

Total number of episodes

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 400

object

Optional map of field names to their error messages (for validation errors)

additional property

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/media

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "media": [
    • {
      • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
      • "slug": "bakuman",
      • "externalIds": {
        • "anilist": "21459",
        • "imdb": "tt1234567",
        • "tvdb": "12345",
        • "tmdb": "90955"
        },
      • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
      • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
      • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",
      • "airingFormat": "TV",
      • "airingStatus": "FINISHED",
      • "genres": [
        • "Comedy",
        • "Drama",
        • "Romance",
        • "Slice of Life"
        ],
      • "coverUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/cover.webp",
      • "bannerUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/banner.webp",
      • "startDate": "2010-10-02",
      • "endDate": "2011-04-02",
      • "category": "ANIME",
      • "segmentCount": 1234,
      • "episodeCount": 25,
      • "studio": "J.C.STAFF",
      • "seasonName": "FALL",
      • "seasonYear": 2010
      }
    ],
  • "pagination": {
    • "hasMore": true,
    • "cursor": "eyJraW...IxfQ"
    },
  • "stats": {
    • "totalMedia": 312,
    • "totalSegments": 184520,
    • "totalEpisodes": 4287
    }
}

Get single media

Returns a single media entry by its public ID with full metadata.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
path Parameters
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Media public ID

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the media (use this in public URLs)

slug
required
string non-empty

URL-friendly slug for the media

required
object (ExternalId)

External IDs for this media, keyed by source. Every source appears as a key; absent mappings are represented with a null value.

anilist
required
string or null non-empty

AniList ID

imdb
required
string or null non-empty

IMDB ID

tvdb
required
string or null non-empty

TVDB ID

tmdb
required
string or null non-empty

TMDB ID

nameJa
required
string non-empty

Original Japanese name of the media

nameRomaji
required
string non-empty

Romaji transliteration of the media name

nameEn
required
string non-empty

English name of the media

airingFormat
required
string
Enum: "TV" "MOVIE" "OVA" "ONA" "SPECIAL"

Format of the media release

airingStatus
required
string
Enum: "FINISHED" "RELEASING" "NOT_YET_RELEASED" "CANCELLED"

Current airing status

genres
required
Array of strings[ items non-empty ]

List of genres associated with the media

coverUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the cover image

bannerUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the banner image

startDate
required
string <date> non-empty

Start date of the media (first airing/release)

endDate
required
string or null <date> non-empty

End date of the media (last airing/release)

category
required
string (Category)
Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category type

segmentCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of subtitle segments available

episodeCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of episodes available

studio
required
string or null

Animation studio that produced the media

seasonName
required
string
Enum: "WINTER" "SPRING" "SUMMER" "FALL"

Airing season label for the media

seasonYear
required
integer [ 1900 .. 2100 ]

Airing year for the media

code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/media/{mediaPublicId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
  • "slug": "bakuman",
  • "externalIds": {
    • "anilist": "21459",
    • "imdb": "tt1234567",
    • "tvdb": "12345",
    • "tmdb": "90955"
    },
  • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
  • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
  • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",
  • "airingFormat": "TV",
  • "airingStatus": "FINISHED",
  • "genres": [
    • "Comedy",
    • "Drama",
    • "Romance",
    • "Slice of Life"
    ],
  • "coverUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/cover.webp",
  • "bannerUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/banner.webp",
  • "startDate": "2010-10-02",
  • "endDate": "2011-04-02",
  • "category": "ANIME",
  • "segmentCount": 1234,
  • "episodeCount": 25,
  • "studio": "J.C.STAFF",
  • "seasonName": "FALL",
  • "seasonYear": 2010
}

List episodes for a media

Returns a paginated list of episodes for a specific media.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
path Parameters
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Media public ID

query Parameters
take
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 50

Maximum number of episodes to return

cursor
string

Opaque pagination cursor token

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (Episode)
Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID this episode belongs to

episodeNumber
required
integer >= 0

Episode number within the media (0 for movies/specials)

titleEn
required
string or null non-empty

English title of the episode

titleRomaji
required
string or null non-empty

Romanized title of the episode

titleJa
required
string or null non-empty

Japanese title of the episode

description
required
string or null non-empty

Episode description or synopsis

airedAt
required
string or null <date-time>

When the episode originally aired

lengthSeconds
required
integer or null >= 0

Episode duration in seconds

thumbnailUrl
required
string or null <uri> non-empty

URL to episode thumbnail image

segmentCount
required
integer >= 0

Number of segments in this episode

required
object (CursorPagination)

Opaque cursor pagination metadata

hasMore
required
boolean

Whether more results are available

cursor
required
string or null non-empty

Opaque token to pass on the next request to fetch the following page

code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/media/{mediaPublicId}/episodes

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "episodes": [
    • {
      • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
      • "episodeNumber": 1,
      • "titleEn": "The Beginning",
      • "titleRomaji": "Hajimari",
      • "titleJa": "始まり",
      • "description": "The hero begins their journey",
      • "airedAt": "2024-01-15T09:00:00Z",
      • "lengthSeconds": 1420,
      • "thumbnailUrl": "https://example.com/thumbnails/episode1.jpg",
      • "segmentCount": 450
      }
    ],
  • "pagination": {
    • "hasMore": true,
    • "cursor": "eyJraW...IxfQ"
    }
}

Get single episode

Returns a specific episode by media public ID and episode number.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
path Parameters
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Media public ID

episodeNumber
required
integer >= 0
Example: 1

Episode number (0 for movies/specials)

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID this episode belongs to

episodeNumber
required
integer >= 0

Episode number within the media (0 for movies/specials)

titleEn
required
string or null non-empty

English title of the episode

titleRomaji
required
string or null non-empty

Romanized title of the episode

titleJa
required
string or null non-empty

Japanese title of the episode

description
required
string or null non-empty

Episode description or synopsis

airedAt
required
string or null <date-time>

When the episode originally aired

lengthSeconds
required
integer or null >= 0

Episode duration in seconds

thumbnailUrl
required
string or null <uri> non-empty

URL to episode thumbnail image

segmentCount
required
integer >= 0

Number of segments in this episode

code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

application/json
{
  • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
  • "episodeNumber": 1,
  • "titleEn": "The Beginning",
  • "titleRomaji": "Hajimari",
  • "titleJa": "始まり",
  • "description": "The hero begins their journey",
  • "airedAt": "2024-01-15T09:00:00Z",
  • "lengthSeconds": 1420,
  • "thumbnailUrl": "https://example.com/thumbnails/episode1.jpg",
  • "segmentCount": 450
}

Get single segment

Returns a specific segment by its public ID.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
path Parameters
segmentPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Segment public ID

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
segmentPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the segment (nanoid)

position
required
integer >= 0

Position of the segment within the episode

status
required
string (SegmentStatus)
Enum: "ACTIVE" "HIDDEN" "DELETED"

Segment status

startTimeMs
required
integer >= 0

Start time of the segment in milliseconds from the beginning of the episode

endTimeMs
required
integer >= 0

End time of the segment in milliseconds from the beginning of the episode

contentRating
required
string (ContentRating)
Enum: "SAFE" "SUGGESTIVE" "QUESTIONABLE" "EXPLICIT"

Content rating level for the segment

episode
required
integer >= 0

Episode number this segment belongs to (0 for movies/specials)

mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID of the media this segment belongs to (nanoid)

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

Original Japanese content

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

Japanese content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint.

required
Array of objects or null (Token)

Morphological tokens for interactive display. Populated only for segments with available POS analysis.

Array
s
required
string

Surface form (the text as it appears in the sentence)

d
required
string

Dictionary form (base/lemma form for search)

r
required
string

Reading in katakana

b
required
integer

Begin character offset in textJa.content

e
required
integer

End character offset in textJa.content

p
required
string

Primary part-of-speech tag

p1
required
string or null non-empty

POS subtype 1 (UniDic pos[1])

p2
required
string or null non-empty

POS subtype 2 (UniDic pos[2])

p4
required
string or null non-empty

Conjugation type (UniDic pos[4])

cf
required
string or null non-empty

Conjugation form (UniDic pos[5])

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

English translation

isMachineTranslated
required
boolean

Whether the translation was machine-translated

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

English content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint that matched this language.

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

Spanish translation

isMachineTranslated
required
boolean

Whether the translation was machine-translated

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

Spanish content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint that matched this language.

required
object

URLs to media resources for this segment

imageUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the subtitle image snapshot

audioUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the audio clip for this segment

videoUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the video clip for this segment

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 400

The HTTP status code

object

Optional map of field names to their error messages (for validation errors)

property name*
additional property
string

string

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/media/segments/{segmentPublicId}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "segmentPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
  • "position": 1133,
  • "status": "ACTIVE",
  • "startTimeMs": 2007255,
  • "endTimeMs": 2008464,
  • "contentRating": "SAFE",
  • "episode": 1,
  • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
  • "textJa": {
    • "content": "僕は僕で、君は君だ。",
    • "highlight": "string",
    • "tokens": [
      • {
        • "s": "食べ",
        • "d": "食べる",
        • "r": "タベ",
        • "b": 3,
        • "e": 5,
        • "p": "動詞",
        • "p1": "固有名詞",
        • "p2": "人名",
        • "p4": "五段-カ行",
        • "cf": "連用形-一般"
        }
      ]
    },
  • "textEn": {
    • "content": "I am me, and you are you.",
    • "isMachineTranslated": false,
    • "highlight": "string"
    },
  • "textEs": {
    • "content": "Yo soy yo, y tú eres tú.",
    • "isMachineTranslated": false,
    • "highlight": "string"
    },
  • "urls": {
    • "imageUrl": "http://example.com",
    • "audioUrl": "http://example.com",
    • "videoUrl": "http://example.com"
    }
}

Get surrounding context for a segment

Retrieves segments surrounding a specific segment within an episode. Returns segments both before and after the target, providing dialogue context for how a sentence is used.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
path Parameters
segmentPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Segment public ID

query Parameters
take
integer [ 1 .. 30 ]
Default: 3

Number of segments to return before and after the target

contentRating
Array of strings (ContentRating)
Items Enum: "SAFE" "SUGGESTIVE" "QUESTIONABLE" "EXPLICIT"
Example: contentRating=SAFE

Content ratings to include (omit for all ratings)

include
Array of strings (IncludeExpansion)
Default: ""
Items Value: "media"

Optional resources to expand in the response includes block

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (Segment)
Array
segmentPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the segment (nanoid)

position
required
integer >= 0

Position of the segment within the episode

status
required
string (SegmentStatus)
Enum: "ACTIVE" "HIDDEN" "DELETED"

Segment status

startTimeMs
required
integer >= 0

Start time of the segment in milliseconds from the beginning of the episode

endTimeMs
required
integer >= 0

End time of the segment in milliseconds from the beginning of the episode

contentRating
required
string (ContentRating)
Enum: "SAFE" "SUGGESTIVE" "QUESTIONABLE" "EXPLICIT"

Content rating level for the segment

episode
required
integer >= 0

Episode number this segment belongs to (0 for movies/specials)

mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID of the media this segment belongs to (nanoid)

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

Original Japanese content

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

Japanese content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint.

required
Array of objects or null (Token)

Morphological tokens for interactive display. Populated only for segments with available POS analysis.

Array
s
required
string

Surface form (the text as it appears in the sentence)

d
required
string

Dictionary form (base/lemma form for search)

r
required
string

Reading in katakana

b
required
integer

Begin character offset in textJa.content

e
required
integer

End character offset in textJa.content

p
required
string

Primary part-of-speech tag

p1
required
string or null non-empty

POS subtype 1 (UniDic pos[1])

p2
required
string or null non-empty

POS subtype 2 (UniDic pos[2])

p4
required
string or null non-empty

Conjugation type (UniDic pos[4])

cf
required
string or null non-empty

Conjugation form (UniDic pos[5])

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

English translation

isMachineTranslated
required
boolean

Whether the translation was machine-translated

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

English content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint that matched this language.

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

Spanish translation

isMachineTranslated
required
boolean

Whether the translation was machine-translated

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

Spanish content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint that matched this language.

required
object

URLs to media resources for this segment

imageUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the subtitle image snapshot

audioUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the audio clip for this segment

videoUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the video clip for this segment

object

Optional related resources requested via include[]

object

Media objects keyed by mediaPublicId. Present only when include[]=media is requested.

additional property
object (Media)

Media entry with full metadata

mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the media (use this in public URLs)

slug
required
string non-empty

URL-friendly slug for the media

required
object (ExternalId)

External IDs for this media, keyed by source. Every source appears as a key; absent mappings are represented with a null value.

anilist
required
string or null non-empty

AniList ID

imdb
required
string or null non-empty

IMDB ID

tvdb
required
string or null non-empty

TVDB ID

tmdb
required
string or null non-empty

TMDB ID

nameJa
required
string non-empty

Original Japanese name of the media

nameRomaji
required
string non-empty

Romaji transliteration of the media name

nameEn
required
string non-empty

English name of the media

airingFormat
required
string
Enum: "TV" "MOVIE" "OVA" "ONA" "SPECIAL"

Format of the media release

airingStatus
required
string
Enum: "FINISHED" "RELEASING" "NOT_YET_RELEASED" "CANCELLED"

Current airing status

genres
required
Array of strings[ items non-empty ]

List of genres associated with the media

coverUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the cover image

bannerUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the banner image

startDate
required
string <date> non-empty

Start date of the media (first airing/release)

endDate
required
string or null <date> non-empty

End date of the media (last airing/release)

category
required
string (Category)
Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category type

segmentCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of subtitle segments available

episodeCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of episodes available

studio
required
string or null

Animation studio that produced the media

seasonName
required
string
Enum: "WINTER" "SPRING" "SUMMER" "FALL"

Airing season label for the media

seasonYear
required
integer [ 1900 .. 2100 ]

Airing year for the media

code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

required
string non-empty

required
string non-empty

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/media/segments/{segmentPublicId}/context

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "segments": [
    • {
      • "segmentPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
      • "position": 1133,
      • "status": "ACTIVE",
      • "startTimeMs": 2007255,
      • "endTimeMs": 2008464,
      • "contentRating": "SAFE",
      • "episode": 1,
      • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
      • "textJa": {
        • "content": "僕は僕で、君は君だ。",
        • "highlight": "string",
        • "tokens": [
          • {
            • "s": "食べ",
            • "d": "食べる",
            • "r": "タベ",
            • "b": 3,
            • "e": 5,
            • "p": "動詞",
            • "p1": "固有名詞",
            • "p2": "人名",
            • "p4": "五段-カ行",
            • "cf": "連用形-一般"
            }
          ]
        },
      • "textEn": {
        • "content": "I am me, and you are you.",
        • "isMachineTranslated": false,
        • "highlight": "string"
        },
      • "textEs": {
        • "content": "Yo soy yo, y tú eres tú.",
        • "isMachineTranslated": false,
        • "highlight": "string"
        },
      • "urls": {
        • "imageUrl": "http://example.com",
        • "audioUrl": "http://example.com",
        • "videoUrl": "http://example.com"
        }
      }
    ],
  • "includes": {
    • "media": {
      • "property1": {
        • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
        • "slug": "bakuman",
        • "externalIds": {
          • "anilist": "21459",
          • "imdb": "tt1234567",
          • "tvdb": "12345",
          • "tmdb": "90955"
          },
        • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
        • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
        • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",
        • "airingFormat": "TV",
        • "airingStatus": "FINISHED",
        • "genres": [
          • "Comedy",
          • "Drama",
          • "Romance",
          • "Slice of Life"
          ],
        • "coverUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/cover.webp",
        • "bannerUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/banner.webp",
        • "startDate": "2010-10-02",
        • "endDate": "2011-04-02",
        • "category": "ANIME",
        • "segmentCount": 1234,
        • "episodeCount": 25,
        • "studio": "J.C.STAFF",
        • "seasonName": "FALL",
        • "seasonYear": 2010
        },
      • "property2": {
        • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
        • "slug": "bakuman",
        • "externalIds": {
          • "anilist": "21459",
          • "imdb": "tt1234567",
          • "tvdb": "12345",
          • "tmdb": "90955"
          },
        • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
        • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
        • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",
        • "airingFormat": "TV",
        • "airingStatus": "FINISHED",
        • "genres": [
          • "Comedy",
          • "Drama",
          • "Romance",
          • "Slice of Life"
          ],
        • "coverUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/cover.webp",
        • "bannerUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/banner.webp",
        • "startDate": "2010-10-02",
        • "endDate": "2011-04-02",
        • "category": "ANIME",
        • "segmentCount": 1234,
        • "episodeCount": 25,
        • "studio": "J.C.STAFF",
        • "seasonName": "FALL",
        • "seasonYear": 2010
        }
      }
    }
}

User

User endpoints for profile data, excluded media, and activity history.

Get current user profile

Returns the authenticated user's profile and current month API quota.

You can also check your usage stats at https://nadeshiko.co/user/developer.

Authorizations:
ApiKey

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
object
username
required
string non-empty

The user's display name.

createdAt
required
string <date-time>

When the account was created.

role
required
string non-empty

The user's account tier or role.

required
object
used
required
integer >= 0

Number of API requests used this month.

limit
required
integer >= 0

Maximum number of API requests allowed per month.

remaining
required
integer >= 0

Number of API requests remaining this month.

periodYyyymm
required
integer >= 202001

Current month in YYYYMM format.

periodStart
required
string <date-time>

Start of the current month (UTC).

periodEnd
required
string <date-time>

End of the current month (UTC).

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_INVALID" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_EXPIRED"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

required
string non-empty

string <uri> non-empty

instance
string non-empty

required
integer

string
Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Value: "INTERNAL_SERVER_EXCEPTION"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 500

The HTTP status code

object

Optional map of field names to their error messages (for validation errors)

property name*
additional property
string

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/user/me

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "user": {
    • "username": "tanaka_san",
    • "createdAt": "2024-03-15T10:00:00.000Z",
    • "role": "USER"
    },
  • "quota": {
    • "used": 342,
    • "limit": 5000,
    • "remaining": 4658,
    • "periodYyyymm": 202602,
    • "periodStart": "2026-02-01T00:00:00.000Z",
    • "periodEnd": "2026-02-28T23:59:59.999Z"
    }
}

List excluded media

Returns the list of media entries the authenticated user has excluded from search results.

Authorizations:
ApiKey

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (MediaSummary)
Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the media

slug
required
string non-empty

URL-friendly slug for the media

nameJa
required
string non-empty

Original Japanese name of the media

nameRomaji
required
string non-empty

Romaji transliteration of the media name

nameEn
required
string non-empty

English name of the media

coverUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the cover image

category
required
string (Category)
Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category type

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_INVALID" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_EXPIRED"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

required
string non-empty

      • "category": "ANIME"
      }
    ]
}

Exclude media from search results

Adds a media entry to the authenticated user's excluded media list. Excluded media is hidden from search results.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID of the media to exclude

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

required
string non-empty

application/json

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403

  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "code": "VALIDATION_FAILED",
  • "title": "Validation Failed",
  • "detail": "The request data did not pass validation rules. Please check the errors field for details.",
  • "type": "https://github.com/BrigadaSOS/Nadeshiko/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml",
  • "instance": "trace-id-placeholder",
  • "status": 400,
  • "errors": {
    • "query": "Required",
    • "limit": "Must be a positive integer",
    • "email": "Invalid email format"
    }
}

Remove media from excluded list

Removes a media entry from the authenticated user's excluded list, making it visible in search results again.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
path Parameters
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Public ID of the media to remove from the excluded list

required
string

application/json
Example

  • "code": "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED",
  • "title": "Authentication Credentials Required",
  • "detail": "No API key or session credentials were provided. Please include an Authorization Bearer token or a valid session cookie.",

  • "instance": "trace-id-placeholder",

}

Activity

Activity endpoints for tracking and querying the authenticated user's activity history.

List user activity

Returns the authenticated user's activity history with cursor-based pagination.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
query Parameters
cursor
string

Opaque cursor token for keyset pagination

take
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20

Number of results per page

activityType
string (ActivityType)
Enum: "SEARCH" "ANKI_EXPORT" "SEGMENT_PLAY" "SHARE"

Filter by activity type

date
string <date>

Filter activities to a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD)

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (UserActivity)
Array
id
required
integer >= 1
activityType
required
string (ActivityType)
Enum: "SEARCH" "ANKI_EXPORT" "SEGMENT_PLAY" "SHARE"

Type of user activity

segmentPublicId
required
string or null non-empty ^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
mediaPublicId
required
string or null non-empty ^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
searchQuery
required
string or null non-empty
mediaName
required
string or null non-empty
japaneseText
required
string or null non-empty
createdAt
required
string <date-time>
required
object (CursorPagination)

Opaque cursor pagination metadata

hasMore
required
boolean

Whether more results are available

cursor
required
string or null non-empty

Opaque token to pass on the next request to fetch the following page

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_INVALID" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_EXPIRED"

required
string non-empty

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

integer

  • 401

  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "activities": [
    • {
      • "id": 1,
      • "activityType": "SEARCH",
      • "segmentPublicId": "string",
      • "mediaPublicId": "string",
      • "searchQuery": "string",
      • "mediaName": "string",
      • "japaneseText": "string",
      • "createdAt": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
      }
    ],
  • "pagination": {
    • "hasMore": true,
    • "cursor": "eyJraW...IxfQ"
    }
}

Get activity heatmap data

Returns daily activity counts for the authenticated user, grouped by date and activity type. Each day contains per-type counts that can be summed or filtered client-side.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
query Parameters
days
integer [ 1 .. 730 ]
Default: 365

Number of days to include in the heatmap

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
object

Map of YYYY-MM-DD date strings to per-type activity counts

additional property
object (HeatmapDayCounts)

Activity counts for a single day, broken down by type. Only types with at least 1 event are present.

SEARCH
integer >= 0
SEGMENT_PLAY
integer >= 0
ANKI_EXPORT
integer >= 0
SHARE
integer >= 0
Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_INVALID" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_EXPIRED"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

required
integer
Value: 401

  • "activityByDay": {
    • "property1": {
      • "SEARCH": 0,

      }
    }
}

Get user activity statistics

Returns aggregate statistics about the authenticated user's activity: total searches, exports, plays, list adds, shares, and top media.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
query Parameters
since
string <date>

Only count activities from this date onward (YYYY-MM-DD)

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
totalSearches
required
integer >= 0
totalExports
required
integer >= 0
totalPlays
required
integer >= 0
totalListAdds
required
integer >= 0
totalShares
required
integer >= 0
required
Array of objects
Array
mediaPublicId
required
string non-empty
mediaName
required
string non-empty
count
required
integer >= 1
Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_INVALID" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_EXPIRED"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 500

The HTTP status code

object

Optional map of field names to their error messages (for validation errors)

property name*
additional property
string

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/user/activity/stats

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 403
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "totalSearches": 1240,
  • "totalExports": 82,
  • "totalPlays": 3400,
  • "totalListAdds": 58,
  • "totalShares": 17,
  • "topMedia": [
    • {
      • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
      • "mediaName": "Steins;Gate",
      • "count": 240
      }
    ]
}

Collections

Collection endpoints for managing saved segment collections.

List collections

Returns the authenticated user's collections. Can be filtered by visibility.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
query Parameters
visibility
string (CollectionVisibility)
Enum: "PUBLIC" "PRIVATE"
Example: visibility=PRIVATE

Filter by visibility

cursor
string
Example: cursor=eyJraW5kIjoib2Zmc2V0Iiwic2tpcCI6MjB9

Opaque pagination cursor token

take
integer [ 1 .. 100 ]
Default: 20
Example: take=20

Items per page

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (Collection)
Array
collectionPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the collection

name
required
string

Name of the collection

type
required
string
Enum: "USER" "ANKI_EXPORT"

Type of the collection

visibility
required
string (CollectionVisibility)
Enum: "PUBLIC" "PRIVATE"

Visibility of a collection

segmentCount
required
integer

Number of segments in the collection

createdAt
required
string <date-time>

When the collection was created

updatedAt
required
string or null <date-time>

When the collection was last updated

required
object (CursorPagination)

Opaque cursor pagination metadata

hasMore
required
boolean

Whether more results are available

cursor
required
string or null non-empty

Opaque token to pass on the next request to fetch the following page

code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

Create collection

Creates a new segment collection for the authenticated user.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
Request Body schema: application/json
required
name
required
string non-empty

Name of the collection

visibility
string (CollectionVisibility)
Enum: "PUBLIC" "PRIVATE"

Visibility of a collection

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
collectionPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the collection

name
required
string

Name of the collection

type
required
string
Enum: "USER" "ANKI_EXPORT"

Type of the collection

visibility
required
string (CollectionVisibility)
Enum: "PUBLIC" "PRIVATE"

Visibility of a collection

segmentCount
required
integer

Number of segments in the collection

createdAt
required
string <date-time>

When the collection was created

updatedAt
required
string or null <date-time>

When the collection was last updated

Get collection details

Returns collection metadata only. To query segments inside the collection, use POST /v1/collections/{collectionPublicId}/search. To add or remove saved segments, use the /segments endpoints.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
path Parameters
collectionPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Collection public ID

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
collectionPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the collection

name
required
string

Name of the collection

type
required
string
Enum: "USER" "ANKI_EXPORT"

Type of the collection

visibility
required
string (CollectionVisibility)
Enum: "PUBLIC" "PRIVATE"

Visibility of a collection

segmentCount
required
integer

Number of segments in the collection

createdAt
required
string <date-time>

When the collection was created

updatedAt
required
string or null <date-time>

When the collection was last updated

Delete collection

Deletes a collection and all its segment entries. Requires collection ownership.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
path Parameters
collectionPublicId
required
string
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Collection public ID

Responses

code
required
string
