Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "code": "VALIDATION_FAILED",
  • "title": "Validation Failed",
  • "detail": "The request data did not pass validation rules. Please check the errors field for details.",
  • "type": "https://github.com/BrigadaSOS/Nadeshiko/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml",
  • "instance": "trace-id-placeholder",
  • "status": 400,
  • "errors": {
    • "query": "Required",
    • "limit": "Must be a positive integer",
    • "email": "Invalid email format"
    }
}

Search segments in a collection

Searches within a collection.

All search semantics, query parsing, sorting, filters, pagination, and include expansions behave the same as /v1/search, with one additional constraint: results are limited to segments already present in the target collection.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
path Parameters
collectionPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Collection public ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required
object (SearchQuery)

What to search for (omit for queryless browse/stats)

search
string <= 500 characters

Search expression (supports boolean operators, wildcards, phrase matching)

exactMatch
boolean
Default: false

Require exact phrase matching (disables fuzzy and partial matches)

take
integer [ 1 .. 50 ]
Default: 10

Max number of entries per response

cursor
string <= 500 characters

Opaque cursor token returned from the previous search page

object (SearchSort)

Sort configuration

mode
string
Default: "RELEVANCE"
Enum: "RELEVANCE" "ASC" "DESC" "TIME_ASC" "TIME_DESC" "RANDOM"

Sort mode.

  • RELEVANCE (default): Elasticsearch relevance score
  • ASC / DESC: by segment length (character count)
  • TIME_ASC / TIME_DESC: by episode & position within an episode
  • RANDOM: deterministic random order (pass seed for reproducibility)
seed
integer >= 0

Non-negative integer seed for deterministic random sorting (only used when mode is RANDOM)

object (SearchFilters)

Search filters for narrowing segment results

object

Media inclusion/exclusion filters

Array of objects (MediaFilterItem)

Include only segments from these media (with optional episode filter)

Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID (nanoid)

episodes
Array of integers[ items >= 0 ]

Specific episodes (omit for all episodes). Use 0 for movies/specials

Array of objects (MediaFilterItem)

Exclude segments from these media (with optional episode filter)

Array
mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Media public ID (nanoid)

episodes
Array of integers[ items >= 0 ]

Specific episodes (omit for all episodes). Use 0 for movies/specials

category
Array of strings (Category)
Default: ["ANIME","JDRAMA"]
Items Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category filter

contentRating
Array of strings (ContentRating)
Items Enum: "SAFE" "SUGGESTIVE" "QUESTIONABLE" "EXPLICIT"

Content ratings to include (omit for all ratings)

status
Array of strings (SegmentStatus)
Default: ["ACTIVE"]
Items Enum: "ACTIVE" "HIDDEN" "DELETED"

Segment status filter

object

Content character count range filter

min
integer >= 0

Minimum content length

max
integer >= 0

Maximum content length

object

Segment audio duration range filter (in milliseconds)

min
integer >= 0

Minimum duration in ms

max
integer >= 0

Maximum duration in ms

languages
Array of strings
Items Enum: "EN" "ES"

Translation languages to include alongside Japanese in search matching.

  • Omitted / null: match against Japanese and all translation languages (default)
  • []: match against Japanese only
  • ["EN"] / ["ES"] / ["EN", "ES"]: match against Japanese plus the listed translation languages
include
Array of strings (IncludeExpansion)
Default: []
Items Value: "media"

Optional resources to expand in the response includes block

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (Segment)
Array
segmentPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the segment (nanoid)

position
required
integer >= 0

Position of the segment within the episode

status
required
string (SegmentStatus)
Enum: "ACTIVE" "HIDDEN" "DELETED"

Segment status

startTimeMs
required
integer >= 0

Start time of the segment in milliseconds from the beginning of the episode

endTimeMs
required
integer >= 0

End time of the segment in milliseconds from the beginning of the episode

contentRating
required
string (ContentRating)
Enum: "SAFE" "SUGGESTIVE" "QUESTIONABLE" "EXPLICIT"

Content rating level for the segment

episode
required
integer >= 0

Episode number this segment belongs to (0 for movies/specials)

mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID of the media this segment belongs to (nanoid)

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

Original Japanese content

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

Japanese content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint.

required
Array of objects or null (Token)

Morphological tokens for interactive display. Populated only for segments with available POS analysis.

Array
s
required
string

Surface form (the text as it appears in the sentence)

d
required
string

Dictionary form (base/lemma form for search)

r
required
string

Reading in katakana

b
required
integer

Begin character offset in textJa.content

e
required
integer

End character offset in textJa.content

p
required
string

Primary part-of-speech tag

p1
required
string or null non-empty

POS subtype 1 (UniDic pos[1])

p2
required
string or null non-empty

POS subtype 2 (UniDic pos[2])

p4
required
string or null non-empty

Conjugation type (UniDic pos[4])

cf
required
string or null non-empty

Conjugation form (UniDic pos[5])

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

English translation

isMachineTranslated
required
boolean

Whether the translation was machine-translated

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

English content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint that matched this language.

required
object
content
required
string [ 1 .. 500 ] characters

Spanish translation

isMachineTranslated
required
boolean

Whether the translation was machine-translated

highlight
required
string or null non-empty

Spanish content with <mark> tags wrapping terms that matched a search query. Only populated on segments returned from a search endpoint that matched this language.

required
object

URLs to media resources for this segment

imageUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the subtitle image snapshot

audioUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the audio clip for this segment

videoUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

URL to the video clip for this segment

object

Optional related resources requested via include[]

object

Media objects keyed by mediaPublicId. Present only when include[]=media is requested.

additional property
object (Media)

Media entry with full metadata

mediaPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Public ID for the media (use this in public URLs)

slug
required
string non-empty

URL-friendly slug for the media

required
object (ExternalId)

External IDs for this media, keyed by source. Every source appears as a key; absent mappings are represented with a null value.

anilist
required
string or null non-empty

AniList ID

imdb
required
string or null non-empty

IMDB ID

tvdb
required
string or null non-empty

TVDB ID

tmdb
required
string or null non-empty

TMDB ID

nameJa
required
string non-empty

Original Japanese name of the media

nameRomaji
required
string non-empty

Romaji transliteration of the media name

nameEn
required
string non-empty

English name of the media

airingFormat
required
string
Enum: "TV" "MOVIE" "OVA" "ONA" "SPECIAL"

Format of the media release

airingStatus
required
string
Enum: "FINISHED" "RELEASING" "NOT_YET_RELEASED" "CANCELLED"

Current airing status

genres
required
Array of strings[ items non-empty ]

List of genres associated with the media

coverUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the cover image

bannerUrl
required
string <uri> non-empty

Full URL to the banner image

startDate
required
string <date> non-empty

Start date of the media (first airing/release)

endDate
required
string or null <date> non-empty

End date of the media (last airing/release)

category
required
string (Category)
Enum: "ANIME" "JDRAMA"

Media category type

segmentCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of subtitle segments available

episodeCount
required
integer >= 0

Total number of episodes available

studio
required
string or null

Animation studio that produced the media

seasonName
required
string
Enum: "WINTER" "SPRING" "SUMMER" "FALL"

Airing season label for the media

seasonYear
required
integer [ 1900 .. 2100 ]

Airing year for the media

required
object (SearchPagination)

Pagination metadata for search results

hasMore
required
boolean

Whether there are more results after this page

estimatedTotalHits
required
integer >= 0

Estimated total number of matching segments

estimatedTotalHitsRelation
required
string
Enum: "EXACT" "AT_LEAST"

Whether estimatedTotalHits is exact or a lower bound.

  • EXACT: the value is the precise total
  • AT_LEAST: at least this many matches exist (true total may be higher)
cursor
required
string or null non-empty

Opaque cursor token to pass on the next request to fetch the following page

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 400

The HTTP status code

object

Optional map of field names to their error messages (for validation errors)

property name*
additional property
string
Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_INVALID" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_EXPIRED"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 401

object

property name*
additional property
string

string

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/collections/{collectionPublicId}/search

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "query": {
    • "search": "(猫 OR 犬) AND 好き",
    • "exactMatch": false
    },
  • "take": 10,
  • "cursor": "eyJraW...N119",
  • "sort": {
    • "mode": "RELEVANCE",
    • "seed": 42
    },
  • "filters": {
    • "media": {
      • "include": [
        • {
          • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
          • "episodes": [
            • 1,
            • 2
            ]
          }
        ],
      • "exclude": [
        • {
          • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
          • "episodes": [
            • 1,
            • 2
            ]
          }
        ]
      },
    • "category": [
      • "ANIME",
      • "JDRAMA"
      ],
    • "contentRating": [
      • "SAFE"
      ],
    • "status": [
      • "ACTIVE"
      ],
    • "segmentLengthChars": {
      • "min": 10,
      • "max": 50
      },
    • "segmentDurationMs": {
      • "min": 1000,
      • "max": 10000
      },
    • "languages": [
      • "EN"
      ]
    },
  • "include": [ ]
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "segments": [
    • {
      • "segmentPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
      • "position": 1133,
      • "status": "ACTIVE",
      • "startTimeMs": 2007255,
      • "endTimeMs": 2008464,
      • "contentRating": "SAFE",
      • "episode": 1,
      • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
      • "textJa": {
        • "content": "僕は僕で、君は君だ。",
        • "highlight": "string",
        • "tokens": [
          • {
            • "s": "食べ",
            • "d": "食べる",
            • "r": "タベ",
            • "b": 3,
            • "e": 5,
            • "p": "動詞",
            • "p1": "固有名詞",
            • "p2": "人名",
            • "p4": "五段-カ行",
            • "cf": "連用形-一般"
            }
          ]
        },
      • "textEn": {
        • "content": "I am me, and you are you.",
        • "isMachineTranslated": false,
        • "highlight": "string"
        },
      • "textEs": {
        • "content": "Yo soy yo, y tú eres tú.",
        • "isMachineTranslated": false,
        • "highlight": "string"
        },
      • "urls": {
        • "imageUrl": "http://example.com",
        • "audioUrl": "http://example.com",
        • "videoUrl": "http://example.com"
        }
      }
    ],
  • "includes": {
    • "media": {
      • "property1": {
        • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
        • "slug": "bakuman",
        • "externalIds": {
          • "anilist": "21459",
          • "imdb": "tt1234567",
          • "tvdb": "12345",
          • "tmdb": "90955"
          },
        • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
        • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
        • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",
        • "airingFormat": "TV",
        • "airingStatus": "FINISHED",
        • "genres": [
          • "Comedy",
          • "Drama",
          • "Romance",
          • "Slice of Life"
          ],
        • "coverUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/cover.webp",
        • "bannerUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/banner.webp",
        • "startDate": "2010-10-02",
        • "endDate": "2011-04-02",
        • "category": "ANIME",
        • "segmentCount": 1234,
        • "episodeCount": 25,
        • "studio": "J.C.STAFF",
        • "seasonName": "FALL",
        • "seasonYear": 2010
        },
      • "property2": {
        • "mediaPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
        • "slug": "bakuman",
        • "externalIds": {
          • "anilist": "21459",
          • "imdb": "tt1234567",
          • "tvdb": "12345",
          • "tmdb": "90955"
          },
        • "nameJa": "バクマン。",
        • "nameRomaji": "Bakuman.",
        • "nameEn": "Bakuman.",
        • "airingFormat": "TV",
        • "airingStatus": "FINISHED",
        • "genres": [
          • "Comedy",
          • "Drama",
          • "Romance",
          • "Slice of Life"
          ],
        • "coverUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/cover.webp",
        • "bannerUrl": "https://cdn.example.com/media/anime/bakuman/banner.webp",
        • "startDate": "2010-10-02",
        • "endDate": "2011-04-02",
        • "category": "ANIME",
        • "segmentCount": 1234,
        • "episodeCount": 25,
        • "studio": "J.C.STAFF",
        • "seasonName": "FALL",
        • "seasonYear": 2010
        }
      }
    },
  • "pagination": {
    • "hasMore": true,
    • "estimatedTotalHits": 12456,
    • "estimatedTotalHitsRelation": "AT_LEAST",
    • "cursor": "string"
    }
}

Add segment to collection

Adds a segment to a collection. Requires collection ownership.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
path Parameters
collectionPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Collection public ID

Request Body schema: application/json
required
segmentPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$

Segment public ID

note
string <= 500 characters

Optional annotation

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

status
required
integer
Value: 400

The HTTP status code

object

Optional map of field names to their error messages (for validation errors)

property name*
additional property
string
Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_INVALID" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_EXPIRED"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

required
string non-empty

string non-empty

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/collections/{collectionPublicId}/segments

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "segmentPublicId": "V1StGXR8_Z5d",
  • "note": "string"
}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "code": "VALIDATION_FAILED",
  • "title": "Validation Failed",
  • "detail": "The request data did not pass validation rules. Please check the errors field for details.",
  • "type": "https://github.com/BrigadaSOS/Nadeshiko/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml",
  • "instance": "trace-id-placeholder",
  • "status": 400,
  • "errors": {
    • "query": "Required",
    • "limit": "Must be a positive integer",
    • "email": "Invalid email format"
    }
}

Remove segment from collection

Removes a segment from a collection. Requires collection ownership.

Authorizations:
ApiKey
path Parameters
collectionPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Collection public ID

segmentPublicId
required
string^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{12}$
Example: V1StGXR8_Z5d

Segment public ID

Responses

code
required
string
Enum: "VALIDATION_FAILED" "INVALID_JSON" "INVALID_REQUEST"

required
string non-empty

required
string non-empty

required
integer

Production server

https://api.nadeshiko.co/v1/collections/{collectionPublicId}/segments/{segmentPublicId}

Response samples

  • 400
  • 401
  • 403
  • 404
  • 429
  • 500
Content type
application/json
Example
{
  • "code": "VALIDATION_FAILED",
  • "title": "Validation Failed",
  • "detail": "The request data did not pass validation rules. Please check the errors field for details.",
  • "type": "https://github.com/BrigadaSOS/Nadeshiko/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml",
  • "instance": "trace-id-placeholder",
  • "status": 400,
  • "errors": {
    • "query": "Required",
    • "limit": "Must be a positive integer",
    • "email": "Invalid email format"
    }
}

Stats

Statistics endpoints for corpus coverage and word frequency data.

Get corpus statistics overview

Returns a comprehensive overview of corpus statistics including headline numbers, word frequency coverage tiers, and translation availability.

The same data powers the public stats page at https://nadeshiko.co/stats.

Authorizations:
ApiKey

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
totalSegments
required
integer >= 0

Total number of active segments in the corpus

totalEpisodes
required
integer >= 0

Total number of episodes

totalMedia
required
integer >= 0

Total number of media entries

totalFrequencyWords
required
integer >= 0

Total number of words in the frequency list

dialogueHours
required
number <float> >= 0

Total hours of Japanese dialogue (subtitle coverage time)

required
Array of objects (WordCoverageTier)
Array
tier
required
integer >= 1

The frequency tier (e.g. 1000 means top 1000 words)

covered
required
integer >= 0

Number of words with at least one match in the corpus

total
required
integer >= 0

Total number of words in this tier

percentage
required
number <float> [ 0 .. 100 ]

Coverage percentage

lastUpdated
required
string or null <date-time>

When the word coverage data was last updated

required
object
total
required
integer >= 0

Total active segments

enHuman
required
integer >= 0

Segments with human English translations

enMachine
required
integer >= 0

Segments with machine English translations

esHuman
required
integer >= 0

Segments with human Spanish translations

esMachine
required
integer >= 0

Segments with machine Spanish translations

Response Schema: application/json
code
required
string
Enum: "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_REQUIRED" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_INVALID" "AUTH_CREDENTIALS_EXPIRED"

Specific error code for programmatic handling

title
required
string non-empty

A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail
required
string non-empty

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

type
string <uri> non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the problem type (e.g., GitHub issues link)

instance
string non-empty

A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence (e.g., trace ID)

required
integer
